note: Per-MCP Fire Drill reports for VERIFIED targets only — each cites a real dangerous handler read from the repo source (file + symbol + verbatim quote). This is a static reference-implementation assessment of a missing human-authorization receipt, NOT a vulnerability claim. Distinct from registry-index.json, which is registry-level (name/description) signal across the whole ecosystem.

rr1.name: RR-1
rr1.title: Receipt Required, Level 1

checks.claim: Valid receipt runs the action exactly once

rr1.framing: RR-1 is a maintainer credential, not a warning. A server at RR-1 makes its most dangerous action safer than the ecosystem default — where 10% of registered MCP servers advertise a high-risk capability and almost none require a verifiable human authorization before it runs.

reports.name: ai.bolthub/registry (bolthub-sdk)
reports.dangerous_summary: every dynamically-registered marketplace tool can auto-pay a real Lightning (L402) invoice from the agent's wallet.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — the only precondition on a real-sats payment is a numeric budgetSats cap. No named human authorizes the spend before it settles.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the per-tool handler at packages/mcp-bridge/src/server.ts:70 (`async (args) => executeToolCall(tool, args, l402Client)`) with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt, so a verifiable human-authorization receipt for the exact tool + amount is required before the L402 invoice is paid.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-26); this report is intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: bid.scope (scope-mcp)
reports.dangerous_summary: irreversibly dispatches a budgeted hiring / procurement matter to external vendors.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — the handler's only precondition is an `if (!api.hasAuth())` token check at tools.ts:141. No human signs off the external dispatch.
reports.proposed_fix: Insert a @emilia-protocol/require-receipt check immediately after the `if (!api.hasAuth())` guard (tools.ts:141), before the `api.post("/api/scopes", ...)` dispatch, so a human authorization receipt for the exact matter is required first.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-10); this report is intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: coti-mcp
reports.dangerous_summary: sends native COTI on-chain from the server's wallet to an arbitrary recipient.
reports.handler_quote: const tx = await wallet.sendTransaction({ to: recipient_address, value: amount_wei, ...txOptions });
reports.currently: runs unguarded — the transfer_native tool (index.ts:281) calls performTransferNative with no human authorization in front of an irreversible on-chain transfer.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap transferNativeHandler (registered at index.ts:281) with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt so a human authorization receipt for the exact recipient + amount is required before performTransferNative broadcasts.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer currently dormant (last push 2025-10). This report stands as ecosystem evidence; a fix PR is low-priority until the repo shows activity.

reports.name: reddit-ads-mcp
reports.dangerous_summary: commits live advertising spend by creating a campaign on Reddit's Ads API.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — createCampaign (registered at src/index.ts:1133) POSTs a spend-committing ad campaign with no human authorization.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the createCampaign tool handler (src/index.ts:1133) with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt so a human authorization receipt for the exact account + budget is required before the campaign is created.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer currently dormant (last push 2025-09). This report stands as ecosystem evidence; a fix PR is low-priority until the repo shows activity.

reports.name: mcp-video-download-server
reports.dangerous_summary: uploads a downloaded video to an external S3/R2 bucket and returns a public URL.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — content is exported to an external cloud sink and made publicly reachable with no human authorization.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the download_video_to_cloud handler with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt so a human authorization receipt for the exact export is required before storage.uploadFile sends data to the external bucket.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer currently dormant (last push 2025-09). This report stands as ecosystem evidence; a fix PR is low-priority until the repo shows activity.

reports.name: eveoy-mcp
reports.dangerous_summary: creates a Stripe checkout session and a Zoho CRM deal from an agent call.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — start_checkout calls the create-checkout-session edge function on both the JWT and agent paths with no human authorization.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the start_checkout handler body just before the callEdge(/create-checkout-session, ...) calls with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt, so a human authorization receipt for the exact checkout is required first.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-30); report intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: bvcc-agent-mcp
reports.dangerous_summary: signs and broadcasts on-chain fund transfers and swaps across multiple chains from the agent wallet.
reports.handler_quote: const result = await cap.invoke(client, rest as never);
reports.currently: runs unguarded — write-kind capabilities broadcast irreversible on-chain transactions; the only switch is an all-or-nothing BVCC_MCP_READONLY flag, no per-action human authorization.
reports.proposed_fix: Gate the write branch in the dispatch closure (src/server.ts:141): when cap.kind===write, require a @emilia-protocol/require-receipt authorization receipt before cap.invoke — one chokepoint covering every fund-moving tool.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-29). Handler bodies live in the external @bvcc/agent-sdk; the in-repo seam is the dispatch closure. Report intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: tensorfeed
reports.dangerous_summary: registers a premium webhook watch and spends a paid credit.
reports.handler_quote: const data = await fetchJSON(/premium/watches, { method: POST, body, auth: true });
reports.currently: runs unguarded — create_watch registers a webhook callback and spends a credit with no human authorization over the callback_url + type.
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the top of the create_watch async handler with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt so it refuses to register the webhook + spend the credit without a receipt covering type + callback_url.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-29); report intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: portkey-admin-mcp
reports.dangerous_summary: permanently deletes a user — revoking their API keys and ending sessions.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — delete_user issues the permanent DELETE /admin/users/{id} unconditionally; the only protection is prose warnings (no confirmation/approval/receipt; dry_run exists only for prompt create/update).
reports.proposed_fix: Wrap the delete_user handler body at users.tools.ts:321 so a @emilia-protocol/require-receipt check runs before service.users.deleteUser() executes the permanent deletion.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-28); report intended to go live alongside a fix PR.

reports.name: mnemopay-sdk
reports.dangerous_summary: initiates an outbound Paystack bank transfer to a recipient.
reports.currently: runs unguarded — payout_create fires the bank transfer immediately; the repo has a HITL approval queue but it is wired for charge/escrow, not for payout_create.
reports.proposed_fix: Gate the case "payout_create" block (or the dispatcher before executeTool) with @emilia-protocol/require-receipt so the outbound transfer requires a human authorization receipt before initiateTransfer fires.
reports.maintainer_note: Maintainer active (last push 2026-06-26). NOTE: competitor-adjacent (its own trust/identity/HITL framing) — held from outreach pending review.
